postToolUse.run: cd frontend && npm run lint -- --quiet 2>&1 | head -30

postToolUse.if: tool == 'Edit' or tool == 'Write' and path matches /frontend\/src\/core\//
postToolUse.run: cd frontend && npm test -- --run src/core/ 2>&1 | tail -20
postToolUse.description: Run core tests after business logic changes
